name: Document Guardian
author: QUILL Team
description: Guards your work with smart pre-close and pre-save checks: warns before closing very short documents that look unfinished, and optionally stamps an 'Updated:' line before every save.

document_events.title: Warn before closing short documents
document_events.description: If a document appears to be a work-in-progress (very few words, no file path yet, or contains a configurable TODO marker), speaks a warning before the tab closes. Does not block the close — just makes sure you heard it.

document_events.title: Stamp last-updated line before save
document_events.description: Finds a line beginning with 'Updated:' anywhere in the document and replaces it with the current date and time. If no such line exists, does nothing. Useful for keeping a visible modification date in plain-text notes.

document_events.title: Confirm save with file size
document_events.description: After every save, announces the file path and byte size so you know the save landed on the expected drive and that the file is not empty.

document_events.title: Document Guardian enabled
document_events.description: Announces activation so you always know Document Guardian is watching your documents.

document_events.title: Document Guardian disabled
document_events.description: Announces deactivation so you know close-guard and save-stamp are no longer running.

document_events.title: QUILL shutting down
document_events.description: Performs any cleanup needed when QUILL exits while Document Guardian is active.

preferences.title: Document Guardian
preferences.description: Settings for the Document Guardian Quillin.

tabs.title: Close Guard
tabs.description: Configure when and how Document Guardian warns before a tab closes.

settings.label: Warn before closing short documents
settings.description: Announce a warning when a document below the word threshold is about to close.

settings.label: Minimum word count to warn
settings.description: If the document has fewer than this many words and has never been saved, a close warning is spoken. Set to 0 to disable.

settings.label: TODO marker text
settings.description: If the document contains this text (case-insensitive), a close warning is spoken regardless of word count. Leave blank to disable this check.

tabs.title: Save Stamp
tabs.description: Optionally update a timestamp line in the document before each save.

settings.label: Update timestamp line before save
settings.description: Find a line beginning with 'Updated:' in the document and replace it with the current date and time.

settings.label: Timestamp format
settings.description: Format of the date and time written into the 'Updated:' line.

tabs.title: Save Confirmation
tabs.description: Announce file path and size after every save.

settings.label: Confirm save with file path and size
settings.description: After every save, speak the file name and the byte count. Useful when saving to network or external drives where confirmation is reassuring.
